nodes.name: Watch GYG Emails
nodes.notes: Configure IMAP credentials for the inbox that receives GetYourGuide emails. Sender: do-not-reply@notification.getyourguide.com. Handles 3 email types: new bookings ('Booking - S709718 - {REF}'), urgent bookings ('Urgent: New booking received - S709718 - {REF}'), and cancellations ('A booking has been canceled - S709718 - {REF}').

nodes.name: Filter GYG Emails
nodes.notes: Matches all 3 GYG email types by checking: (1) from contains 'getyourguide', (2) subject contains ' - S709718 - ' which is the supplier ID segment present in all booking, urgent booking, and cancellation subjects.

nodes.name: Route by Type
nodes.notes: Determines email_type from the subject line: 'new_booking' for regular and urgent bookings, 'cancellation' for canceled bookings. Also extracts the reference_code from the last segment of the subject.

nodes.name: New Booking?
nodes.notes: Branches the flow: TRUE output (index 0) = new_booking (regular or urgent), FALSE output (index 1) = cancellation. Both paths converge at the Import Summary node.

nodes.name: Parse GYG Email Body
nodes.notes: Parses the GetYourGuide new/urgent booking confirmation HTML email body using regex. Extracts activity name, date/time, participant count, customer details, and price. Reference code is passed through from the Route by Type node.

nodes.name: Match Event & Session
nodes.notes: Calls the match_event_session RPC to find the matching event_id and session_id by activity name and date. Uses the same RPC function as the SFF and Promotix workflows.

nodes.name: Upsert Customer to CRM
nodes.notes: Upserts the customer into the customers CRM table. Uses Prefer: resolution=merge-duplicates to match on the email unique constraint. Source set to 'getyourguide'. Also stores the GYG proxy email and phone number.

nodes.name: Prepare Ticket Entry
nodes.notes: Builds the manual_ticket_entries insert payload. Sets partner_id for GetYourGuide, commission_rate at 27%, status to 'confirmed', and gross_revenue from the parsed price. Does NOT include commission_amount or net_revenue as those are generated columns in the database.

nodes.name: Insert Ticket Entry
nodes.notes: Inserts the ticket entry with status 'confirmed'. The unique index on booking_reference will reject duplicates (409 Conflict), which is expected and handled by the summary node.

nodes.name: Parse Cancellation Email
nodes.notes: Parses the GYG cancellation email body. Extracts reference number, customer name, date, and tour name from simple Label: value patterns. The reference code is used to locate the existing booking entry for status update.

nodes.name: Cancel Ticket Entry
nodes.notes: PATCHes the existing manual_ticket_entries row matching the booking_reference. Sets status to 'cancelled' and cancelled_at to the current ISO timestamp. Returns the updated row for verification in the summary.

nodes.name: Import Summary
nodes.notes: Aggregates results from both new booking and cancellation paths. Tracks inserted, cancelled, duplicate, and error counts with per-item details.

nodes.name: Errors - Review Needed
nodes.notes: Add a Slack or email notification here to alert when GetYourGuide imports have errors.
